title: [BUG] Image position
author: marina31714
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

Lib version: 4.4.0
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/exceljs/4.4.0/exceljs.min.js"></script>

## Steps To Reproduce

Add an image into de ExcelJS but it is not positioned correctly. It is positioned at the beginning of column A. The row position is correct.

var imageId = workbook.addImage({
                base64: image.src,
                extension: this.getImageExtension(image.src)
            });
            worksheet.addImage(imageId, {
                tl: { col: 0.7474, row: 0.85},
                ext: { width: 100, height: 100 },
                editAs: 'absolute'
            });

## The expected behaviour:

The image should be positioned almost at the end of the row and almost at the end of the column A

## More information

If I put tl : { col: 0, row: 0.85 } Positioned where indicated
If I put tl : { col: 0.5, row: 0.85 } Not positioned where indicated
If I put tl : { col: 1, row: 0.85 } Positioned where indicated

In version 4.3 the same thing happened to me but in reverse, it did not place the images correctly in the rows.
